@@ -81,6 +82,31 @@
         logits = self.out(h)

         return logits

 

+class DKT_Concat_GRU_LN(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.num_skills = num_skills

+        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

+        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

+        self.ln1 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim * 2)

+        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

+        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

+        self.ln2 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)

+        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        

+    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

+        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

+        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

+        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)

+        x = self.ln1(x)

+        x = self.dropout(x)

+        h, _ = self.gru(x)

+        h = self.ln2(h)

+        h = self.dropout(h)

+        logits = self.out(h)

+        return logits

+

 class DKT_SkillEmb(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

         super().__init__()

-        self.attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim, num_heads, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)

+        self.attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim, num_heads, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)

+        

         self.layer_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

         self.layer_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

         

         self.ffn = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim * 4),

+            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(embed_dim * 4, embed_dim)

+            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim)

         )

+        

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

         self.pred = nn.Linear(embed_dim, 1)

         

     def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, next_skills):

-        B, T = skill_ids.shape

+        device = skill_ids.device

+        seq_len = skill_ids.size(1)

         

         interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills

-        x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

+        v = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

         

-        positions = torch.arange(T, device=skill_ids.device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T)

-        pos_embeds = self.pos_emb(positions)

+        positions = torch.arange(seq_len, device=device).unsqueeze(0)

+        v = v + self.pos_emb(positions)

         

-        x = x + pos_embeds

-        x = self.dropout(x)

+        q = self.skill_emb(next_skills)

         

-        query = self.skill_emb(next_skills)

+        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(seq_len, seq_len, device=device), diagonal=1).bool()

         

-        causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=skill_ids.device), diagonal=1).bool()

+        attn_out, _ = self.attention(q, v, v, attn_mask=mask)

         

-        attn_out, _ = self.attn(query, x, x, is_causal=True, attn_mask=causal_mask)

+        x = self.layer_norm1(q + self.dropout(attn_out))

+        ffn_out = self.ffn(x)

+        x = self.layer_norm2(x + self.dropout(ffn_out))

         

-        out1 = self.layer_norm1(query + self.dropout(attn_out))

-        

-        ffn_out = self.ffn(out1)

-        out2 = self.layer_norm2(out1 + self.dropout(ffn_out))

-        

-        logits = self.pred(out2).squeeze(-1)

-        return logits

+        out = self.pred(x).squeeze(-1)

+        return out
